Enum Class Difficulty

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<Difficulty>
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Difficulty
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<Difficulty>, Constable
public enum Difficulty extends Enum<Difficulty>
Enum representing game difficulty levels with associated configuration. Each difficulty defines zombie count, speed, spawn positions, trap positions, coin count, and food count.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    EASY
    Easy difficulty configuration: - Fewer, slower zombies. - More food items. - Moderate number of coins to collect. - Fewer zombie spawn points and traps.
    HARD
    Hard difficulty configuration: - Maximum number of faster zombies. - More coins required to collect. - Minimal food items available. - Maximum number of zombie spawn points and traps.
    MEDIUM
    Medium difficulty configuration: - Balanced number of zombies at moderate speed. - Balanced number of coins, food, and traps.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getNumCoins()
    Gets the total number of coins to be spawned for this difficulty.
    int
    getNumFood()
    Gets the total number of food items to be spawned for this difficulty.

    Gets the array of all available zombie spawn positions.
    double

  • Enum Constant Details

    • EASY

      public static final Difficulty EASY
      Easy difficulty configuration: - Fewer, slower zombies. - More food items. - Moderate number of coins to collect. - Fewer zombie spawn points and traps.

    • MEDIUM

      public static final Difficulty MEDIUM
      Medium difficulty configuration: - Balanced number of zombies at moderate speed. - Balanced number of coins, food, and traps.

    • HARD

      public static final Difficulty HARD
      Hard difficulty configuration: - Maximum number of faster zombies. - More coins required to collect. - Minimal food items available. - Maximum number of zombie spawn points and traps.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static Difficulty[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static Difficulty valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getNumZombies

      public int getNumZombies()
      Gets the number of zombies configured for this difficulty.
      Returns:
      The number of zombies.

    • getZombieSpeed

      public double getZombieSpeed()
      Gets the speed multiplier for zombies at this difficulty.
      Returns:
      The zombie speed multiplier.

    • getNumCoins

      public int getNumCoins()
      Gets the total number of coins to be spawned for this difficulty.
      Returns:
      The number of coins.

    • getNumFood

      public int getNumFood()
      Gets the total number of food items to be spawned for this difficulty.
      Returns:
      The number of food items.

    • getZombieSpawns

      public Position[] getZombieSpawns()
      Gets the array of all available zombie spawn positions.
      Returns:
      An array of Position objects for zombie spawns.

    • getTrapSpawns

      public Position[] getTrapSpawns()
      Gets the array of all available trap spawn positions.
      Returns:
      An array of Position objects for trap spawns.

    • getZombieSpawnAt

      public Position getZombieSpawnAt(int index)
      Gets the zombie spawn position at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - The index of the spawn position
      Returns:
      The Position object, or null if index is out of bounds

    • hasMoreZombieSpawns

      public boolean hasMoreZombieSpawns(int index)
      Checks if there are more zombie spawns available at the given index.
      Parameters:
      index - The index to check
      Returns:
      true if index is valid, false otherwise
